description_long: This is a single bed with a minimalist, rectangular wooden frame featuring a light natural finish. The bed includes both a headboard and a footboard, each constructed from solid wood panels with clean, straight lines and no decorative elements. The mattress is clearly visible and appears to be covered with a light gray, textured fabric, giving the bed a simple and modern look. The frame sits close to the ground, with four sturdy wooden legs at each corner, providing stable support. There are no visible storage compartments or additional features such as drawers or rails. The overall design is functional and unembellished, suitable for contemporary or urban environments.
description: A minimalist single bed with a light wood frame, visible headboard and footboard, and a gray textured mattress. The design is simple, modern, and functional.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the bed, with both the headboard and footboard visible and the mattress surface exposed.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bed, with the headboard in the background and the footboard in the foreground, emphasizing the bed's rectangular shape.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the opposite side of the bed with the same headboard and footboard design.
description_view_3: Side view from the opposite direction, again showing the bed's length and the simple, solid wood construction.
